name: ship-deploy
title: Ship deployment — {{project}}
description: Full /ship deployment workflow: quality gates, safety audit, deploy, verify.

steps.title: Pre-flight — git status + branch state for {{project}}
steps.description:
Run git-preflight checks:
- git status (no uncommitted secrets)
- git log vs origin
- Branch up to date
- No stale worktrees
- CHANGELOG.md updated if applicable

steps.title: Run /ship quality gates — {{project}}
steps.description:
/ship runs 12+ gates including:
- Dependabot vulns (ALL must fix)
- npm audit (ALL must fix)
- Biome lint (auto-setup if missing)
- Security review
- Code scanning
- React mount verification (Gate 7)
- SEO FOUC check (Gate 7.5)

Per feedback_ship_fix_all_issues.md — never skip gates.

steps.title: Safety audit tier {{audit_tier}} — {{project}}
steps.description:
Audit checks based on tier:
- Tier 1: silent failures, security, tests
- Tier 2: blind spots, test quality, rate limits
- Tier 3: code archaeology, critical paths

steps.title: Deploy to {{environment}} — {{project}}
steps.description:
For frontend projects: always clean build first (per feedback_verification_before_done.md)
  rm -rf dist && tsc -b && vite build && wrangler deploy

For Rails projects: migrate then deploy.
For Workers: wrangler deploy.

steps.title: Verify deploy with real traffic — {{project}}
steps.description:
Per carmack-verification rule:
- curl a canonical URL
- Verify bundle hash
- Test golden-path feature
- Monitor logs for 2 min
- Check adjacent services didn't break
